Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 102 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 1 0 0}There's a woman over there all alone.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 102 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}It's unusual to find someone not in a group.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 102 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}No boyfriends to be seen in the area either! I think we're in the clear![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 102 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}Alright, time to make contact.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1001}I've been watching you, by the way. You've been trying to pick up girls for a while.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1001}But you know why you didn't succeed? It's because you don't understand what a woman feels.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1500}Haha, that's what I thought. You boys don't understand women at all.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1001}You in the hat. You're way too wrapped up in yourself.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1001}Shouldn't you be thinking more about how to make your partner happy?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 19 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1001}You in the T-shirt. You're the type that's stoic, but not very experienced with girls.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 102 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 20 0 0}Y-Yeah, I guess that might be true.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 21 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1001}You seem like kind of a hassle, too. Like you're super logical about everything.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 23 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1001}And you, with the long hair... I'm not sure about you.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 24 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1001}Haha, I mean you're mysterious. Like, no one can ever tell what you're really thinking.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_019_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 27 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1001}Mhmm, I think you're just my type.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_020_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 28 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1001}Wow, you're pretty innocent.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 29 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1001}Mhmm, I think you're just my type.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_024_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 34 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1001}Want me to tell you what would make me really happy?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_026_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 36 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1001}Could I ask you to help me put on my sunscreen?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_027_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 4 102 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 37 0 0}What!? I mean, uh, you're alright with that!?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_028_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 38 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1001}Of course I am. I have enough for you, too.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_029_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 102 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 40 0 0}Oh man, I'm really sorry guys, but I'm not passin' up this chance![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_030_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 41 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1001}Would you two like to join too? I'll give you a good deal.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_032_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 43 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1001}You know that sun in the sky isn't real, right? That's an artificial sun that got sent into space back in the 1980s.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_034_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 45 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1001}You didn't know? Turns out, that sun sends out harmful rays that mess with your body's equilibrium. Normal sunscreen doesn't work.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 46 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1001}But that's where this special one comes in. And if you opt in right now, you can get three bottles for just 300,000 yen![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_035_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 102 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 47 0 0}Hey, {f 4 1}, doesn't she sound kind of strange?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_037_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 4 102 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 48 0 0}Aaah! What the hell! Don't just leave me behind![n]{f 1 1}
